html:
Exclusive to:  

The Spelunker's Bridge Kit can be placed to make a bridge across the gaps in the Caves, as long as the gap is no more than 6 tiles wide. To place the Spelunker's Bridge Kit, the player needs enough kits to match the bridge’s length. It cannot be placed next to another Bridge or if one side of the edge is blocked.

The Spelunker's Bridge Kit cannot be placed in the Atrium Maze and Ancient Archive.

Once placed, the Spelunker's Bridge is immune to all damage except for Earthquake. Each bridge, regardless of its length, has 200 health, and each Earthquake reduces its health by 50. It’s recommended to use Reinforced Pillars to protect the bridge from Earthquake damage. A bridge does not need to be fully within the Pillar’s protective radius. As long as more than half of a single tile is covered, the entire bridge will be protected.

When damaged, Spelunker's Bridge can be repaired by Boat Patch, Driftwood Piece, Log, Living Log, Twigs and Boards, restoring the same amount as repairing Boats. If the bridge is destroyed, anything on it will fall into Abyss. Items and structures on the bridge cannot be retrieved back, but the players will be sent back to the nearest land with all their items intact.

Gallery

  • Spelunker's Bridge Kit Concept Animation art from Depths of Duplicity announce stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Joke fall Animation from Depths of Duplicity announce stream from Rhymes with Play.

"Suspend your disbelief and cross that bottomless pit."

3 min.

"rope_bridge_kit"
Exclusive to:
“This will keep us in suspense!”
–Wilson
“I'd rather burn a bridge than build one.”
–Willow
“Promise it will keep Wolfgang from falling to death?”
–Wolfgang
“A rope over an abyss.”
–Wendy
“SO SIMPLE A FLESHLING CAN BUILD IT”
–WX-78
“Not exactly a marvel of engineering, but I'm sure it will do.”
–Wickerbottom
“Think she'll hold, Luce?”
–Woodie
“Ugh. You have to build it?!”
–Maxwell
“'Tis nö Bifröst, but 'twill dö.”
–Wigfrid
“We can help!”
–Webber
“This looks like a recipe for disaster.”
–Warly
“Make air steps”
–Wormwood
“We're puttin' a lot of trust in this thing.”
–Winona
“Hope the rope holds.”
–Wortox
“Don't scared! Me build SOOO safe bridge.”
–Wurt
“This is basic Pinetree Pioneer stuff... now, where are those instructions?”
–Walter
“Looks rather shoddy but it beats taking the long way around.”
–Wanda
Spelunker's Bridge
Repaired By:

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ cầu của Spelunker có thể được đặt để làm cầu bắc qua các khoảng trống trong Hang động, miễn là khoảng trống rộng không quá 6 ô. Để đặt Spelunker's Bridge Kit, người chơi cần có đủ bộ dụng cụ phù hợp với chiều dài của cây cầu. Nó không thể được đặt cạnh một cây cầu khác hoặc nếu một bên của cạnh bị chặn.

The '''Spelunker's Bridge Kit''' can be placed to make a bridge across the gaps in the [[Caves]], as long as the gap is no more than 6 tiles wide. To place the Spelunker's Bridge Kit, the player needs enough kits to match the bridge’s length. It cannot be placed next to another Bridge or if one side of the edge is blocked.

The Spelunker's Bridge Kit cannot be placed in the [[Atrium]] Maze and [[Ancient Archive]].

Once placed, the '''Spelunker's Bridge''' is immune to all damage except for [[Earthquake]]. Each bridge, regardless of its length, has 200 health, and each Earthquake reduces its health by 50. It’s recommended to use [[Reinforced Pillar]]s to protect the bridge from Earthquake damage. A bridge does not need to be fully within the Pillar’s protective radius. As long as more than half of a single tile is covered, the entire bridge will be protected.

When damaged, Spelunker's Bridge can be repaired by [[Boat Patch]], [[Driftwood Piece]], [[Log]], [[Living Log]], [[Twigs]] and [[Boards]], restoring the same amount as repairing [[Boat]]s. If the bridge is destroyed, anything on it will fall into [[Abyss]]. Items and structures on the bridge cannot be retrieved back, but the players will be sent back to the nearest land with all their items intact.
